title: saxifraga oligantha
intro: Saxifraga oligantha is a type of alpine plant, belonging to the Saxifragaceae family, commonly known as rock saxifrage. It is a small, perennial herb with yellow flowers, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and urinary problems, due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. Saxifraga oligantha can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used to relieve symptoms of kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and other related health issues.
